title: centaurea litigiosa
intro: Centaurea litigiosa, also known as the bitter knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and heal wounds. The plant is also known for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural antihistamine. Centaurea litigiosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
